label: confirmed from code: listen packages/server/src/transcript-resource-adapter.ts @ 73c934bb07a939cad17df8d083b96892226f07c6 (LISTEN_TRANSCRIPT_SQL_STATEMENT_CATALOG, mechanically extracted via module import)

catalog.name: listen.getConversation
catalog.sql: SELECT id, title, source, source_id, source_url, started_at, ended_at, duration_secs, summary, metadata, transcript_json, transcript_text, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE id = ?

catalog.name: listen.listParticipants
catalog.sql: SELECT id, name, email, speaker_label FROM participant WHERE conversation_id = ? ORDER BY COALESCE(speaker_label, name), id
